name_cn:
M82157!Yellow!EMILIE Wallet
Releasing a modern vibe with Monogram canvas and Monogram Reverse canvas, this wallet features a clean silhouette and rounded flap for high recognizability. A back pocket adds functional details.
Size: 19 x 10 x 2cm
